title_original: ORCA Computing Advances Photonic Quantum Simulation with NVIDIA cuTensorNet - HPCwire
summary_original: ORCA Computing has announced successful integration of its photonic quantum computers with NVIDIA cuTensorNet software, enabling hybrid quantum-classical simulation at Imperial College London. This collaboration allows rapid evaluation of new quantum algorithms and supports cutting-edge research in quantum simulations. The integration leverages ORCA’s quantum systems and NVIDIA’s GPU-accelerated tensor network platform, aiming to solve complex chemistry and physics problems more efficiently. As described, this represents a significant step in exploring hybrid computational approaches, supporting both academic and commercial interest in scalable quantum simulation in 2024.
